text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Gah, how could I be so weak? ...This morning, I
unleashed a forbidden move on my alarm clock.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was being chased in my dream, you see... and
that's when it went off... Ugh, how could I fail to
regain my composure?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No, I cannot let outrage at my own weakness stop
me—instead I must face that weakness head on.
And the first step is learning to control my
emotions.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Then I can polish my technique, and one day
defeat those ghosts!
